index_rebuild_should_select_index_type: You have to select at least one item.
index_rebuild_failed_confirm: Are you sure you want to rebuild all failed indexes?
index_rebuild_tips: You can configure the index types in Settings.
delete_document_confirm: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete file and remove your data from our servers.
or_click_to_browse_files: Or click to browse (max 100MB for each file)
upload_status_existing_desc: This document is already in the knowledge base.
upload_status_failed_desc: The upload did not complete successfully.
upload_status_start_failed_desc: The document was uploaded, but processing could not be started.
import_url_desc: Paste one URL per line. Content will be fetched automatically.
import_url_tips_1: One URL per line, maximum 10 URLs
import_url_tips_2: Only publicly accessible pages are supported
import_url_tips_3: Pages requiring login cannot be fetched
auto_processing_partial: {succeeded} document(s) started processing, {failed} could not be started.
auto_processing_failed: The upload finished, but processing could not be started.
import_text_desc: Paste text content to import into your knowledge base.
upload_completion_alert_description: Your documents were added successfully and processing has started.
upload_completion_alert_graph_hint: Vector and fulltext may appear ready before the MiroFish graph. Check the graph status below for the remaining progress.
index_expectation_hint: For MiroFish collections, vector and fulltext can finish before the graph index. That is expected while the graph is still building or updating.
